name: Best of Zurich e-scooter guided private tour
description: Discover Best of Zurich e-scooter guided private tour in Switzerland.
longDescription: Discover Best of Zurich e-scooter guided private tour in Switzerland.

subcategory.title: E-Scooter
subcategory.description: Book an e-scooter excursion here, self-guided or with a professional guide. E-scooters are often used for sightseeing to quickly cover shorter distances. These are usually e-scooters, which are usually offered without a seat. The maneuverable e-scooters quickly reach their destinations even in narrow alleys. Rides along the banks of rivers or lakes are particularly popular. You enjoy the view, are in the middle of nature and don't have to exert yourself. E-scooters can reach up to 20 km/h.

providers.name: SwissActivities
providers.description: Switzerland's largest activities marketplace — book securely online
